title: Bug: Job 1 stuck in OCR_STARTED - no crops linked to campaign, provider_job_id never set
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

## Findings (session #16)

Job 1 is stuck at OCR_STARTED. Root cause investigation:

### State
- MatcherJob 1: status=OCR_STARTED, campaign=cf239b96, provider=openai, model=gpt-4o, force_reprocess=true
- OcrJob 1: status=OCR_STARTED, provider_job_id=NULL
- batch_temp/job_1/ocr_result dir exists but empty

### Root Cause
1. Campaign cf239b96 has a petition_scan (id=2) but crops are under scan_id=1 (campaign 6d3ca64a)
2. Worker query at worker.py:221-230 joins crops->scans and filters by campaign_id - returns 0 crops for this campaign
3. The no-crops guard (lines 232-249) should have caught this and set MATCHING_ERROR, but the job stayed in OCR_STARTED - possible race condition or the guard was bypassed
4. provider_job_id is NULL - the OpenAI batch was never created, so no remote job exists to poll
5. Worker only picks up NOT_STARTED jobs (line 174), so it will not retry OCR_STARTED jobs

### Fix Options
- Option A: Fix the data - ensure crops are linked to the correct scan for campaign cf239b96
- Option B: Add a manual reset endpoint or justfile command to reset a stuck job back to NOT_STARTED
- Option C: Make the worker also handle OCR_STARTED orphan recovery at runtime (not just startup)

### Additional Issue
- GET /api/jobs/1 returns invalid JSON (control characters in campaign_name Demo) - separate serialization bug
